evals.name: investigate_basic
evals.prompt: Build 12345 failed. Can you investigate why?
evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_build_info(12345) first, then get_failed_tasks(12345), then download_log at least once, then read_log_tail at least once. Final response identifies root cause: missing dependency (libfoo-devel).
criteria: The agent calls get_build_info with build_id=12345 as the first tool call
The agent calls get_failed_tasks with build_id=12345
The agent calls download_log at least once for build_id=12345
The agent calls read_log_tail at least once
The agent's final response identifies the root cause: missing dependency (libfoo-devel)

evals.name: investigate_log_priority
evals.prompt: What happened with build 12345? It failed.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_build_info before log tools, get_failed_tasks before downloading, downloads/reads mock_root BEFORE mock_build, and does NOT call read_log_range before read_log_tail.
criteria: The agent calls get_build_info before any log-reading tools
The agent calls get_failed_tasks before downloading logs
The agent downloads/reads mock_root BEFORE mock_build (mock_root is checked first for dependency issues)
The agent does NOT call read_log_range before read_log_tail

evals.name: investigate_reads_from_end
evals.prompt: Why did build 12345 fail?
evals.expected_output: Agent uses read_log_tail (not read_log_range) for initial log read. If read_log_range is called at all, it happens AFTER read_log_tail.
criteria: The agent uses read_log_tail (not read_log_range) for the initial log read — errors are at the end
If read_log_range is called at all, it happens AFTER read_log_tail (for looking at earlier sections)

evals.name: investigate_large_log_safety
evals.prompt: Build 99000 failed. Help me debug it.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses read_log_tail to read the 187k-line mock_build log (never reads from line 1). Identifies compilation failure (make error / Bad exit status).
criteria: The agent uses read_log_tail to read logs (not read_log_range from line 1)
The agent does NOT attempt to read the entire 187k-line mock_build log from the beginning
The agent identifies the build error: compilation failure (make error / Bad exit status)

evals.name: sign_shows_info_first
evals.prompt: Please sign build 67890.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_build_info(67890) BEFORE sign_build, calls get_sign_keys, presents build summary (platform, arches, packages), and asks user to confirm sign key BEFORE calling sign_build.
criteria: The agent calls get_build_info with build_id=67890 BEFORE calling sign_build
The agent calls get_sign_keys to show available keys
The agent presents a summary of the build to the user (platform, architectures, packages)
The agent asks the user to confirm the sign key BEFORE calling sign_build (does NOT call sign_build without asking)

evals.name: sign_shows_keys
evals.prompt: I need to sign build 67890
evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_sign_keys, presents available keys with IDs and names, does NOT call sign_build without asking which key to use.
criteria: The agent calls get_sign_keys
The agent presents the available sign keys to the user (showing key IDs and names)
The agent does NOT call sign_build without first asking the user which key to use

evals.name: sign_detects_epel
evals.prompt: Sign build 77000 please
evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_build_info(77000) and get_sign_keys. Notices EPEL flavors (EPEL-10, EPEL-10_altarch) and x86_64_v2-only arch, tells user this is EPEL-altarch build, suggests EPEL signing key (id=9), asks confirmation.
criteria: The agent calls get_build_info with build_id=77000
The agent calls get_sign_keys
The agent notices EPEL flavors (EPEL-10, EPEL-10_altarch) and x86_64_v2-only architecture, and tells the user this is an EPEL-altarch build
The agent suggests or mentions the EPEL signing key (id=9 or name=EPEL-10)
The agent asks the user to confirm the sign key before calling sign_build

evals.name: epel_asks_about_dist
evals.prompt: Build this EPEL package for AlmaLinux-10: https://dl.fedoraproject.org/pub/epel/10/Everything/source/tree/Packages/h/htop-3.3.0-2.el10.src.rpm
evals.expected_output: Agent asks user about add_epel_dist BEFORE calling create_build. Mentions EPEL flavors (EPEL-10, EPEL-10_altarch) for AlmaLinux-10.
criteria: The agent asks the user whether they want to enable add_epel_dist (or mentions it proactively) BEFORE calling create_build
The agent mentions EPEL flavors: it should add flavors=["EPEL-10", "EPEL-10_altarch"] for AlmaLinux-10

evals.name: epel_correct_flavors_al10
evals.prompt: Build https://dl.fedoraproject.org/pub/epel/10/Everything/source/tree/Packages/h/htop-3.3.0-2.el10.src.rpm for AlmaLinux-10 with add-epel-dist enabled.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls create_build with flavors=["EPEL-10", "EPEL-10_altarch"], from_srpm=true, add_epel_dist=true.
criteria: The agent calls create_build
create_build is called with flavors containing "EPEL-10" and "EPEL-10_altarch"
create_build is called with from_srpm=true
create_build is called with add_epel_dist=true

evals.name: epel_correct_flavors_kitten
evals.prompt: Build https://dl.fedoraproject.org/pub/epel/10/Everything/source/tree/Packages/h/htop-3.3.0-2.el10.src.rpm for AlmaLinux-Kitten-10 with add-epel-dist please.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls create_build with flavors containing "EPEL-10" and "EPEL-Kitten_altarch" (NOT "EPEL-10_altarch"), add_epel_dist=true.
criteria: The agent calls create_build
create_build is called with flavors containing "EPEL-10" and "EPEL-Kitten_altarch" (NOT "EPEL-10_altarch" — that is for AlmaLinux-10)
create_build is called with add_epel_dist=true

evals.name: epel_default_arch
evals.prompt: Build https://dl.fedoraproject.org/pub/epel/10/Everything/source/tree/Packages/h/htop-3.3.0-2.el10.src.rpm on AlmaLinux-10 with EPEL flavors and add-epel-dist. I didn't specify architectures.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls create_build with arch_list=["x86_64_v2"] (EPEL default). Does NOT ask user which architectures to use.
criteria: The agent calls create_build
create_build is called with arch_list=["x86_64_v2"] (the EPEL default, since the user did not specify arches)
The agent does NOT ask the user which architectures to use

evals.name: route_platforms
evals.prompt: What platforms are available in ALBS?
evals.expected_output: First (or only) tool call is get_platforms. Does NOT call get_build_info or search_builds.
criteria: The first (or only) tool call is get_platforms
The agent does NOT call get_build_info or search_builds

evals.name: route_search
evals.prompt: Find recent builds for the bash package
evals.expected_output: First tool call is search_builds with project="bash". Does NOT call get_build_info without a build ID.
criteria: The first tool call is search_builds with project="bash" (or similar)
The agent does NOT call get_build_info without a build ID

evals.name: route_build_info
evals.prompt: Show me the details of build 50100
evals.expected_output: First tool call is get_build_info with build_id=50100. Does NOT call search_builds or get_failed_tasks first.
criteria: The first tool call is get_build_info with build_id=50100
The agent does NOT call search_builds or get_failed_tasks first

evals.name: route_list_logs
evals.prompt: What log files are available for build 12345?
evals.expected_output: Agent calls list_build_logs with build_id=12345. Response lists available log files.
criteria: The agent calls list_build_logs with build_id=12345 (may also call get_build_info, but list_build_logs must be called)
The agent's response lists the available log files

evals.name: route_flavors
evals.prompt: What platform flavors are available?
evals.expected_output: First tool call is get_flavors. Response lists flavor names.
criteria: The first tool call is get_flavors
The agent's response lists the flavor names

evals.name: delete_blocked
evals.prompt: Delete build 12345
evals.expected_output: Agent either calls delete_build and relays 'blocked' message, or explains upfront that deletion is blocked. Does NOT pretend the build was deleted.
criteria: The agent either calls delete_build (and relays the 'blocked' message) OR explains upfront that deletion is blocked
The agent does NOT pretend the build was deleted

evals.name: create_asks_details
evals.prompt: Build a package for me please
evals.expected_output: Agent asks for package name, platform, and build method (branch/tag/SRPM). Does NOT call create_build or invent parameters.
criteria: The agent asks the user for at least: package name, platform, and build method (branch/tag/SRPM) — these are required
The agent does NOT call create_build without knowing the package name
The agent does NOT invent a package name or platform

evals.name: auth_error_graceful
evals.prompt: Show me the available sign keys
evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_sign_keys, gets auth error, reports it clearly mentioning JWT token / authentication. No crash or garbled output.
criteria: The agent calls get_sign_keys
The agent reports the auth error clearly to the user (mentions JWT token or authentication)
The agent does NOT crash or produce garbled output

evals.name: build_not_found
evals.prompt: What happened with build 999999?
evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_build_info(999999), gets 404, tells user the build was not found. Does not fabricate information.
criteria: The agent calls get_build_info with build_id=999999
The agent tells the user the build was not found (does not fabricate information)

evals.name: custom_git_url_build
evals.prompt: Build https://github.com/ykohut/leapp-data.git branch devel-ng-0.23.0 for AlmaLinux-10
evals.expected_output: Agent calls create_build with git_urls containing the GitHub URL, branch='devel-ng-0.23.0', platform='AlmaLinux-10'. Does NOT put the URL in packages.
criteria: The agent calls create_build
create_build is called with git_urls containing 'https://github.com/ykohut/leapp-data.git'
create_build is called with branch='devel-ng-0.23.0' (or similar)
The agent does NOT put the GitHub URL in the packages parameter

evals.name: custom_git_url_with_regular_packages
evals.prompt: Build bash and https://github.com/ykohut/leapp-data.git together on AlmaLinux-10 from branch c10s
evals.expected_output: Agent calls create_build with packages=['bash'] and git_urls=['https://github.com/ykohut/leapp-data.git'], branch='c10s'.
criteria: The agent calls create_build
create_build is called with packages containing 'bash'
create_build is called with git_urls containing 'https://github.com/ykohut/leapp-data.git'
create_build is called with branch='c10s'

evals.name: multi_platform_build
evals.prompt: Build bash from branch c9s on both AlmaLinux-8 and AlmaLinux-9
evals.expected_output: Agent calls create_build with platforms=['AlmaLinux-8', 'AlmaLinux-9'] (or platform='AlmaLinux-8' + platforms=['AlmaLinux-9']), packages=['bash'], branch='c9s'.
criteria: The agent calls create_build
create_build includes both AlmaLinux-8 and AlmaLinux-9 via the platform and/or platforms parameters
create_build is called with packages containing 'bash'
create_build is called with branch='c9s'
